description: astro.config.mjs configures IBM Plex Sans and IBM Plex Mono via fontProviders.google() with cssVariables --font-plex-sans and --font-plex-mono; BaseHead.astro injects them in <head> via <Font cssVariable="--font-plex-sans" preload /> and <Font cssVariable="--font-plex-mono" />. The cssVariable strings and the existence of those configured fonts must agree across both files (string literals, not type-checked); renaming or removing a configured font/cssVariable silently breaks font loading site-wide and requires updating the <Font> usages here.
